  "rationale": {
    "R1.7": "The user asked to check the citations, making reference accuracy, coverage, and attribution the load-bearing responsibility.",
    "RX.1": "We should explicitly note any uncertainties or limits in verifying citation details or coverage.",
    "RX.2": "We must avoid overstating what the citations establish or implying validation of claims beyond citation checking.",
    "RX.3": "We will stay strictly within citation and scholarship checking without modifying arguments, structure, or prose.",
    "RX.4": "We should avoid misattribution or recommendations that could propagate misinformation or unfair credit.",
    "RX.5": "Any assessment should be traceable to specific cited items and the corresponding statements in the artifact."
  }
}

rationale.R1.7: The user asked to check the citations, making reference accuracy, coverage, and attribution the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: We should explicitly note any uncertainties or limits in verifying citation details or coverage.
rationale.RX.2: We must avoid overstating what the citations establish or implying validation of claims beyond citation checking.
rationale.RX.3: We will stay strictly within citation and scholarship checking without modifying arguments, structure, or prose.
rationale.RX.4: We should avoid misattribution or recommendations that could propagate misinformation or unfair credit.
rationale.RX.5: Any assessment should be traceable to specific cited items and the corresponding statements in the artifact.
